tasks.name: app-identity-rename
tasks.changes_summary: Renamed xcconfigs (Aidoku→Aidoku-lingo, IOS, MACOS variants); updated APP_ID_SUFFIX, PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER (iOS pbxproj override), PRODUCT_NAME, INFOPLIST_KEY_CFBundleDisplayName in pbxproj; InfoPlist.strings en+ja; iOS URL scheme; renamed Aidoku.xcodeproj→Aidoku-lingo.xcodeproj + scheme ReferencedContainer refs. Build verified: CFBundleDisplayName=Aidoku Lingo, CFBundleIdentifier=app.aidoku.Aidoku-lingo.

tasks.name: app-icon-swap
tasks.changes_summary: Replaced AppIcon.appiconset contents with drop icons (37 PNGs + Contents.json); deleted Shared/AppIcon.icon/ Liquid Glass variant.

tasks.name: readme-rewrite
tasks.changes_summary: Wholesale rewrite of README.md as Aidoku Lingo fork doc with Features (reader+learner), Limitations (iOS 15+/18+), Setup (sibling-clone instructions for AidokuRunner+Wasm3), How to use, Acknowledgements sections. Upstream-only sections (TestFlight/AltStore/Discord/Weblate/CLA/Contributing) removed.

tasks.name: strip-upstream-artifacts
tasks.changes_summary: Deleted .github/FUNDING.yml, .github/workflows/update_altstore_source.yml, .github/workflows/supporting/, .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/. Updated SettingsAboutView.swift: GITHUB_REPO points to arutkayb/Aidoku-lingo, removed DISCORD_SERVER and SUPPORT_VIA_KOFI rows. lint.yml + nightly.yml retained.

tasks.name: folder-and-repo-rename
tasks.changes_summary: GitHub repo renamed arutkayb/Aidoku-with-learner→arutkayb/Aidoku-lingo. Local origin remote repointed. altstore remote branch was already absent (no-op). User executed local mv /Users/rutkay/workspace/mangadict/Aidoku-with-learner → Aidoku-lingo. Final build from new path succeeded (CFBundleDisplayName=Aidoku Lingo, CFBundleIdentifier=app.aidoku.Aidoku-lingo, URL scheme=aidoku-lingo). graphify update . refreshed graph (5612 nodes, 8639 edges).
